suppress.notes: CVE-2025-7962 is an SMTP-injection bug in angus-mail (the Jakarta Mail SMTP client, fixed in angus_mail 2.0.4). dependency-check matches it against angus-activation (MIME type resolution only, no SMTP code) via a Low-confidence CPE guess based on the shared "angus"/"eclipse" parent project. angus-activation has no release past 2.0.3 because there is nothing in it to fix.
